doc_title: MonaCoBERT: Monotonic attention based ConvBERT for Knowledge Tracing

rule_hits.summary: Lists the references cited in the paper, covering relevant literature on knowledge tracing, BERT, and related methodologies.
Analyzes the relevance between concepts using monotonic attention weights and visualizes the concept network derived from MonaCoBERT.
The section reviews recent advancements in knowledge tracing models, emphasizing the use of self-attention architectures and the introduction of new embedding methods.
Describes the problem statement, proposed model architecture, embedding strategy, pre-LN Transformer-based encoder, and monotonic convolutional multihead attention mechanism use...
